hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
    cmd = payload.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
    hints = []
    if any(x in cmd for x in ['git commit', 'git add']):
        hints.append('[REMIND] Pre-commit: emoji + code-rules checks will run automatically.')
        hints.append('[REMIND] Commit msg convention: feat/fix/refactor/chore(scope): description')
    if hints:
        print('\n'.join(hints), file=sys.stderr)
except Exception:
    pass
"
